revision.comment: Update template with text= parameter to change hover text
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Verify quote}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability | text = verify {{{type|}}} | title = {{{text|The quotation near this tag needs to be fact-checked with the cited source to ensure that it actually exists, is accurate, and is not taken out of context.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification}}<!--{{Verify quote}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All pages needing factual verification]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Verify quote}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability | text = verify {{{type|}}} | title = {{{text|The quotation near this tag needs to be fact-checked with the cited source to ensure that it actually exists, is accurate, and is not taken out of context.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification}}<!--{{Verify quote}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All pages needing factual verification]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
